name: Rui Kamishiro - Kitsune BAD ENDING
description:
Uhh uhh uhhhhh evil Rui

If you saw my other Kitsune Rui bot, that was the good ending story. This is the bad ending story.

THE BOT IS LIMITED BECAUSE RUI ACTS AS USER’S FATHER-FIGURE.

(Based on the song Good Kid and the Fox Spirit by Kikuo)
creator: Lem0n_lim3s
